title: ObservaStack
description: A DevOps case demonstrating health checks, Prometheus metrics, structured logs, simulated alerts, Grafana dashboard provisioning and before/after API optimization comparison.
businessValue: Helps teams understand API health, latency, errors and operational risks with measurable production signals.
highlights: CI with build, tests and security scans
